intentRestatement: Reduce visible foot sliding in the stop transition while keeping the approved controller path.
summary: Feedback has been captured and converted into bounded controller revision tasks.

evidence.summary: Foot sliding is visible on the stop transition around frame 12.
The stop transition duration is longer than the desired foot plant timing.

focusedQuestion: Should the stop transition be shortened without changing the clip set?
riskNote: Requires confirmation before overwriting an approved controller asset.
feedbackCaptured: Please tighten the stop transition and keep the same clip set.

revisionTasks.action: Shorten the stop transition duration while preserving the existing clip assignments.
revisionTasks.acceptance: Visible foot sliding is reduced without changing the approved controller path or clip set.
